question_lab: Generally speaking, to what extent would you agree with the following statement? 'I have enough money to meet my monthly needs.'
To what extent would you say you are currently experiencing financial difficulties?
Regarding your paid work, to what extent do the following statements apply to your situation? It is essential for my livelihood
Regarding your paid work, would you say it is a source of stress or nervous tension?
